message:
feat(Lib): Implement sysconfig and site modules

sysconfig.zig:
- SCHEME_NAMES and PATH_NAMES constants
- get_config_var and get_config_vars for configuration access
- get_platform for cross-platform detection (linux/macos/windows)
- get_paths and get_path for installation directories
- get_default_scheme and get_preferred_scheme
- getSoabi, getExtSuffix, getSharedLibSuffix helpers

site.zig:
- Site-packages path management (PREFIXES, USER_SITE, USER_BASE)
- main() for site initialization
- getsitepackages and getusersitepackages
- addsitedir and addpackage for .pth file processing
- invenv() for virtual environment detection
- license(), copyright(), credits() info functions
